name: Black Bean Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the black beans, tomato concasse, serrano chile, red bell pepper, red onion, white wine vinegar, corn oil, and kosher salt in a large bowl.
2. Mix well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 60-90 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
4. Serve chilled.
